title: Returnee Cases
subtitle: Manage worker return cases and refund calculations
name: Name
create_description: Submit a new returnee case for a worker with an active contract
worker_id_help: Worker must have an active contract
contract_id_help: Contract must be in Active, Confirmed, or OnProbation status
return_office_hint: Worker will return to inventory as Available for inside-country bookings. Customer refund will be calculated.
return_country_hint: Worker will be repatriated and removed from inventory. If within guarantee, supplier may be liable.
return_reason_placeholder: Describe the reason for the worker's return...
search_placeholder: Search by case code or reason...
empty_description: Submit a returnee case when a worker returns before their contract ends.
approve_office_message: Approving this case will mark the worker as Available and calculate a customer refund based on the amortization formula.
approve_country_message: Approving this case will mark the worker as Repatriated. If within guarantee, supplier liabilities will be recorded.
reject_reason_placeholder: Explain why this case is being rejected...
settle_confirm_message: Mark this case as financially settled. Ensure all refunds and expenses have been processed.
no_expenses: No expenses recorded for this case.
delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete this returnee case? This action cannot be undone.
